lines.speaker: Guard Captain
lines.text: What are you doing here? You're not one of the guards.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was just exploring. Is that okay?

lines.speaker: Guard Captain
lines.text: I suppose, but why would you want to explore down here?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd say it's still pretty warm compared to some places I've been.

lines.speaker: Guard Captain
lines.text: If you say so. Just don't go causing any trouble.
